social_snippets.text: 🎯 Quick check for understanding! These 6th grade exit tickets help students practice citing textual evidence (RI.6.1). Perfect for wrapping up reading lessons! #6thGrade #ReadingComprehension #ExitTickets #TeachersOfTwitter

Looking for a quick way to assess 6th grade reading comprehension? These exit tickets focus on RI.6.1 - citing textual evidence. Great for formative assessment and ensuring students can support their answers with text! Perfect for middle school teachers.
6th Grade Reading Exit Tickets | RI.6.1 Text Evidence Practice | Quick formative assessment tool for middle school ELA teachers | Instant feedback on student understanding
